title: Pestage (disambiguation)
content:
'''Pestage''' can refer to more than one thing:

*'''[[Sate Pestage/Legends|Sate Pestage]]''', the [[Grand Vizier/Legends|Grand Vizier]] of [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]].
**[[Pestage family|His family]]
*'''''[[Pestage (Victory-class)|Pestage]]''''', a [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Victory-class Star Destroyer]] of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Starfleet]].

{{Disambig}}
